title: 01 center eaten crew wakes in peel
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul and Meg's identity and clothing. Image 2 is the established world; continue its top-row geography, empty descending seats, field, and dusk light. Image 3 is exact authority for every mango helper's design and material. BEAT — Medium two-shot. Raul has just eaten the soft center of one peeled mango gummy. He still holds its single long empty edible peel curled across both hands. Exactly four tiny mango helpers have awakened inside the curl: two climb out, one grabs the peel edge, one raises both arms to rally the others. Meg notices the movement beside him. The product action, empty center, continuous peel, and helpers are all readable. AVOID — intact second gummy, paper wrapper physics, helpers floating randomly, armor already formed, crowded row, giant hands, green characters.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, or storyboard grid. Treat each attached image only according to its declared authority. Preserve Raul and Meg as the same teenagers, and preserve the established top-of-bleachers world, dusk light, clothing, and geography. Attached ingredient sheets are exact character or object design authorities; reproduce them faithfully rather than redesigning them from prose. Keep the surreal event localized and legible inside the live-action stadium. Candy remains tactile, translucent, appetizing, and benign. No anatomy, gore, generic gummy bears, captions, borders, watermarks, or invented package copy.
